paper.title: DIAL-KG: Schema-Free Incremental Knowledge Graph Construction via Dynamic Schema Induction and Evolution-Intent Assessment

difficulty.rationale: closed-loop incremental construction with three coupled stages (dual-track extraction, governance adjudication, schema evolution) orchestrated by a Meta-KB; deterministic mock possible but the coupling (cross-doc dedup + evolving induced types) makes it more involved than plain incremental dedup or one-shot schema induction; no GPU/finetuning/large data
